category_sources: source_facts.description says "Fly through your shell history"; official README says McFly replaces ctrl-r shell history search with an intelligent search engine.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README title is "McFly - fly through your shell history"; source_facts.name is mcfly.
docs_sources: Official repository README contains installation, configuration, dump, settings, and development documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/cantino/mcfly; per instructions repo is returned as null when already supplied.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README describe shell history search, zsh/bash/PowerShell support, and Rust implementation.
